TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Atayal, story: AtaNr-dailylife1_Iwan

S.FORM: tiku su sunga' ga ga ka'asi nku sami ka maki' i i imuwag ka kakanairin ga su sunga' yu bali iyen bali sukani la.
S.TRANSL: 以前，不像現在，我們婦女都住家裡。
Before, not like now, women like us used to live in the house.

S.FORM: ga usu i i numaga' pahapuy ru malahang su ulaqi'.
S.TRANSL: (We) will cook and take care of the child.

S.FORM: ru musa' i ragiyax ku tatamalung i musa’ i sumku' su wahi naha' ga.
S.TRANSL: 而男人則上山放繩製的陷阱。
And men go to the mountains to lay traps with ropes.

S.FORM: nanu' u qumlasay ru manu ka tuminun.
S.TRANSL: (We) arrange and circle the thread and then weave.

S.FORM: ru i ukah ku buwax naha' la ga ukah ku talan ru ukah ku buwax naha' ga sumxu'.
S.TRANSL: 如果看到沒有米了，我們就會搗米。
And when seeing there is no rice, we pound rice .

S.FORM: musa' i sumku' sku su wahi naha'.
S.TRANSL: They go to lay traps made with ropes.

S.FORM: ru nanu' naun ru i i muwah la ga nanu' na i naun i.
na naun pahapuy ru sitahuk su raramat.
S.TRANSL: We prepare to cook some dishes (for them).

S.FORM: ru talan ru payux ku sinbu' naha' ka para' waywak la ga paqasun nku kanayril la ga.
S.TRANSL: 看到他們射回那麼多獵物，有山羌和山豬，婦女們很開心。
Seeing so many animals they shot like muntjac and boar, women are so happy.

S.FORM: gi su sunga ga usu i maquwaw su quwaw na itaan ru si'agan su quwaw na itaal ru sibai naha' gi.
S.TRANSL: 因為以前會釀糯米酒，我們給他們糯米酒。
Because (we) used to brew Atayal wine (rice wine), and we give them wine.

S.FORM: ru nanu' u i taqaru' i naha' i paqasi sukuun la ku tinruwiq naha' la ga nanu'.
S.TRANSL: 他們喝完後很開心，並把吊到的獵物分好。
After drinking the wine, they are happy, and they distribute the game they got.

S.FORM: u manabalaiq mapatisan la ru nanu' manabuwag su quwaw.
ru mahananu' ga saing su i.
taqaru' la ga nanu' u mapatisan la ru.
S.TRANSL: After finishing (distributing the game), they chat with each other.

S.FORM: cu yani la nanuwan la pi.
